violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-Coolers were not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezers were not cleaned as frequently as required.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items in reach-in cooler in back storeroom area were not dated.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Bottom of reach-in coolers and freezers need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need test strips for bleach.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
